```markdown
<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer -->
# crates/attractor-cli/src/commands

CLI command implementations for the `pas` binary. All commands invoke the `attractor-pipeline` crate for graph parsing/validation and shell out to the `claude` CLI for LLM interactions.

## Contents

### Pipeline Execution
[run.rs](./run.rs) — `cmd_run` executes a single `.dot` pipeline; `cmd_run_dir` batch-executes pipelines with cross-file resume via `RunManifest` at `.pas/logs/<stem>-batch-<8hex>/manifest.json`. Uses checkpoint files (`checkpoint.json`) and context keys (`max_budget_usd`, `max_steps`, `*.cost_usd`).

[launch.rs](./launch.rs) — `cmd_launch` orchestrates `generate→validate→run` in one command. Validates all pipelines before execution; aborts on `[FAIL]` or parse errors.

[validate.rs](./validate.rs) — `cmd_validate` loads a pipeline and runs `attractor_pipeline::validate`. Exits `1` on any `Severity::Error` diagnostic.

### Pipeline Generation
[generate.rs](./generate.rs) — `cmd_generate` reads spec+optional PRD, calls Claude CLI, extracts DOT via `extract_digraph`, writes to `pipelines/{stem}.dot`. `cmd_generate_dir` batch-generates from `*-spec.md` files (zero-padded prefixes control order). `build_prompt` emits verbatim DOT constraints (double-quoted attrs, bare node IDs, `digraph` only, no `strict`/`graph`/`--`).

[generate.rs.bak](./generate.rs.bak) — Backup of generate.rs with identical `cmd_generate`/`cmd_generate_dir` signatures; kept for reference.

### Document Scaffolding
[plan.rs](./plan.rs) — `cmd_plan` scaffolds PRD or spec documents. Uses `include_str!` templates from `templates/prd-template.md` and `templates/spec-template.md`. Claude invocation: `claude -p <prompt> --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence`.

[scaffold.rs](./scaffold.rs) — `cmd_scaffold` fetches a bd epic ID via `bd show --json`, replaces `goal="..."` in `templates/epic-runner.dot`, writes to `pipelines/{epic_id}.dot`. Validation errors are printed but non-fatal.

### Tracker Integration
[decompose.rs](./decompose.rs) — `cmd_decompose` reads a spec file, calls Claude CLI with JSON prompt, parses `DecomposeOutput` (epic+tasks+dependencies), creates tickets via `bd create`, adds dependencies via `bd dep add`. `validate_decomposition` computes spec coverage % and checks field completeness.

[info.rs](./info.rs) — `cmd_info` displays node/edge counts, start/exit nodes, and full node list with shape/type.

### Module
[mod.rs](./mod.rs) — Barrel re-exporting all commands and their submodules.

## Integration Map

| External Crate | Source | Used By |
|---|---|---|
| `attractor_pipeline::validate` | `crates/attractor-pipeline/src/validation.rs` | generate.rs, launch.rs, validate.rs, scaffold.rs |
| `crate::load_pipeline` | `crates/attractor-cli/src/lib.rs` | info.rs, launch.rs, scaffold.rs, validate.rs |
| `crate::cmd_generate_dir` | `mod.rs` (self) | launch.rs |
| `crate::cmd_run_dir` | `mod.rs` (self) | launch.rs |
| `bd` CLI | system binary | decompose.rs, scaffold.rs |
| `claude` CLI | system binary | decompose.rs, generate.rs, plan.rs |

## Behavioral Contracts

### Claude CLI Invocation Patterns
- generate.rs (primary): `claude -p - --model sonnet --settings '{"enabledPlugins":{}}' --strict-mcp-config '{}' --tools '' --output-format json --no-session-persistence`
- plan.rs: `claude -p <prompt> --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence`
- decompose.rs: `claude -p <prompt> --output-format json --no-session-persistence`

### DOT Output Constraints (from generate.rs)
- `digraph Name { }` only; no `graph`/`strict`/`--`
- Node IDs: `[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*` (bare identifiers)
- All attribute values double-quoted: `shape="Mdiamond"`
- No chained `[a=1][b=2]` blocks

### DOT Shape Semantics
- `"Mdiamond"` — start node
- `"Msquare"` — done/exit node
- `"box"` — work node, `commit_changes` node
- `"diamond"` with `node_type="conditional"` — decision node
- `"hexagon"` with `node_type="wait.human"` — human approval gate
- `"parallelogram"` — tool_command shell nodes

### Timeout Tiers
`"120s"` (trivial), `"300s"` (light), `"600s"` (standard/default), `"900s"` (heavy), `"1200s"` (intensive).

### Commit Step Requirement
Every pipeline must end with `commit_changes` node: `shape="box"`, `timeout="120s"`, `allowed_tools="Bash(git:*)"`.

### Pipeline File Naming
- Single pipeline: `pipelines/{stem}.dot`
- Batch: `*-spec.md` files (zero-padded prefixes control order, e.g. `phase-01-spec.md`)

## Error Handling Patterns
- `anyhow::bail!("Claude CLI failed: {}", stderr)` for CLI failures
- `anyhow::bail!("Failed to parse Claude's JSON output: {}", cleaned)` for JSON parse failures
- Validation failures abort launch/generate but scaffold proceeds with warnings
- Dependency add failures in decompose are non-fatal (eprintf warnings)
```
